TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tabaré Vázquez = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 1 jiyax 17 ka Tabaré Vázquez ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Uruguay ta sayang o kiya ka Tabaré Vázquez, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 3 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tabaɾ* ***quə* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka tabaɾ* ***quə* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan uɾuguaj ta sajaŋ o kija ka tabaɾ* ***quə*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Tabaré Vázquez = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 1 jiyax 17 ka Tabaré Vázquez ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Uruguay ta sayang o kiya ka Tabaré Vázquez, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 3 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tabaɾ* ***quə* = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka tabaɾ* ***quə* ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan uɾuguaj ta sajaŋ o kija ka tabaɾ* ***quə*, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
